demographic_audit_note: Audited Atlantis queue against facility face sheet; corrected patient phone number (primary contact was listed as the facility front desk) and verified Medicare Advantage eligibility for home health benefits.
home_vs_ltc_determination: Social Worker confirms the discharge goal is Home with 24/7 family support; patient is recovering well from cardiac bypass and requires skilled nursing for incision monitoring.
weekly_facility_update: Week 2 Check-in: SW reports patient is meeting PT goals for stair climbing; cardiac output stable. Discharge tentatively set for Friday morning.
v_card_and_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into the patient's smartphone during bedside education; program flyer handed to the patient's spouse to explain the 24-hour post-discharge visit process.
pre_dc_pulse_call_result: 24-hour pulse call completed; spouse confirmed home is ready and the hospital bed was delivered. Re-verified the HHA start-of-care window for the following day.
atlantis_final_sync: Discharge date of 11/15 and initial visit date of 11/16 synchronized in Atlantis; HHA name and contact details verified.
ma_visit_booking: Medical Assistant (MA) scheduled for 11/16 at 1:00 PM to follow the HHA's morning start-of-care visit.
narrative_summary: The patient, a 75-year-old male recovering from a cardiac bypass, was triaged in Atlantis and cleared for home discharge after the SW confirmed a robust family support plan. During the maintenance phase, the PN provided education on post-surgical monitoring and ensured the family had the program contact information via V-Card. However, despite a successful pre-discharge pulse call and MA scheduling, the transition failed on Day 1 when the HHA nurse failed to appear for the start-of-care visit, leaving the patient without clinical monitoring during the critical 24-hour window.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Atlantis Data Audit: Phone number mismatch identified and corrected.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Atlantis Data Audit: Phone number mismatch identified and corrected.

format_1_state_log.event_description: Day 1 Home No-Show: HHA nurse fails to arrive for the scheduled 09:00 AM start-of-care visit.
format_1_state_log.bottleneck_detail: Day 1 Home No-Show: HHA nurse fails to arrive for the scheduled 09:00 AM start-of-care visit.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient's contact information in Atlantis was the facility's main line rather than the patient's cell.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Audited the facility face sheet and manually updated the patient's primary phone number in Atlantis.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Verifying logistics and data accuracy: Audited the facility face sheet and manually updated the patient's primary phone number in Atlantis.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient expressed anxiety about managing sternal incision care at home.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the patient and spouse on the specific role of the HHA nurse and the timing of the first home visit.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Educating on program expectations: Educated the patient and spouse on the specific role of the HHA nurse and the timing of the first home visit.

format_2_triples.situation: The HHA nurse did not arrive at the scheduled time on the first day post-discharge.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Escalated the no-show to the HHA intake coordinator and flagged the safety gap to the Social Worker.
format_2_triples.intent_detail: Escalating to SW for resolution: Escalated the no-show to the HHA intake coordinator and flagged the safety gap to the Social Worker.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Monitor the Atlantis queue for a status change from the HHA and wait for the Social Worker's routine daily discharge follow-up to address the missed visit.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW's role as the primary coordinator of HHA agencies, avoiding direct interference in agency management.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the HHA intake coordinator to verify the nurse's ETA, then notify the SW of the delay while updating the family to manage expectations and ensure safety.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Follows the PN checklist for Stage 3 by verifying HHA confirmation and escalating gaps to the SW without overstepping into clinical management.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Instruct the family to call a different HHA agency that the PN knows has better staffing, and offer to fax the discharge orders to the new agency immediately.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Violates the SW Boundary by suggesting alternative HHAs and the Banned Actions by attempting to manage the referral process.
